query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
query_type=copilot
// flex billable
| max(scanned_partition_count) as p,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scan_bytes by query,user_name

| parse regex field=query "(?i)\b(?<op>avg|count|count_distinct|count_frequent|fillmissing|first|last|min|max|most_recent|least_recent|pct|stddev|sum|abs|acos|asin|atan|atan2|cbrt|ceil|cos|cosh|exp|expm1|floor|hypot|log|log10|log1p|max|min|round|sin|sinh|sqrt|tan|tanh|toDegrees|toRadians|csv|JSON|keyvalue|parse|parse regex|split|xml|accum|backshift|base64Decode|base64Encode|bin|CIDR|concat|contains|decToHex|diff|fields|filter|format|formatDate|geo lookup|haversine|hexToDec|if|in|ipv4ToNumber|isBlank|isEmpty|isNull|isNumeric|isPrivateIP|isPublicIP|isValidIP|join|length|limit|logcompare|logreduce|lookup|luhn|matches|median|merge|now|num|outlier|parseHex|predict|replace|rollingstd|save|sessionize|smooth|sort|substring|timeslice|toLowerCase|toUpperCase|top|total|trace|transaction|transactionize|transpose|urldecode|urlencode|where|nodrop|regex|matches|row|column|values|threatip|geoip|threatlookup|queryendtime|querystarttime)" multi
| count_distinct(user_name) as users, count as instances by op | sort op asc
